name: f-015-knowledge-capability-gating
title: F-015 Knowledge capability gating
description: Implement issue #281 frontend capability gating for Knowledge Gateway 501/not_implemented/dependency_error responses.
creator: EIR
notes: GitHub issue #281 / F-015. Frontend must distinguish ready, not implemented, permission denied, and dependency failures for Knowledge gateway active paths.

review_followups: Document list load errors now use getGatewayCapabilityIssue(error, '文档列表') for 501/not_implemented, 502/dependency_error, and 403/forbidden states.
No-knowledge-base document page selector errors now use getGatewayCapabilityIssue(error, '知识库列表') for 501/not_implemented, 502/dependency_error, and 403/forbidden states.
